# Timendus CHIP-8 test suite (test fixtures)

These ROMs are from [Timendus/chip8-test-suite](https://github.com/Timendus/chip8-test-suite),
licensed **GPL-3.0** (see LICENSE in this directory). They are used ONLY as
CI test fixtures — they are never embedded into or distributed with the
chipdeck binary or website, whose bundled games are all CC0 from
[chip8Archive](https://github.com/JohnEarnest/chip8Archive).
